2021-22 George Washington Revolutionaries Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 12-18 (8-9, 7th in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Jamion Christian

PS/G: 68.4 (252nd of 358)

PA/G: 72.8 (273rd of 358)

SRS: -4.07 (217th of 358)

SOS: 0.40 (133rd of 358)

ORtg: 96.9 (300th of 358)

DRtg: 103.3 (254th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000
